content:
✔ Reroll Items Expire After X Uses or Time
• One-Time Use Items disappear instantly.
• Three-Use Items expire after three total interactions (does not have to be consecutive).
• Timed Items expire after five weeks, regardless of use.

✔ Legendary & Epic Items Expire Regardless of Use
• If a legendary item is not claimed within five class sessions, it disappears.
• If a legendary item is claimed but not used within three actions, it disappears.

✔ Unlocked Challenges Must Be Completed or Are Lost
• Some special secret challenges will appear based on class dynamics.
• If not engaged with within two weeks, they disappear forever.

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Ensures active engagement—students must act fast.
✔ Prevents game-breaking XP hoarding.
✔ Creates urgency and stakes.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 441 (chunk 441/555)
